exercises.name: Chords
exercises.userMessage: Hear the chord and choose your answer

children.name: Basic ninth chords
children.description: Practice recognizing basic minor and major ninth chord colors.

children.name: All ninth chords
children.description: Practice recognizing the full range of ninth chord colors by ear.

children.name: Basic eleventh chords
children.description: Practice recognizing eleventh chord colors by ear.

children.name: Sharp eleventh chords
children.description: Practice recognizing the distinctive color of sharp-eleventh chords.

children.name: All eleventh chords
children.description: Practice recognizing the full range of eleventh chord colors by ear.

children.name: All extended chords
children.description: Practice recognizing ninth, eleventh, and other extended chord sounds.
